g.title: PiLabFlow
g.text: intercept → isolate lanes → execute → choose winner → apply + persist telemetry

g.title: user
g.text: calls edit or another intercepted tool

g.title: config
g.text: project JSON + package experimentDirs + global JSON

g.title: fixed
g.text: all lanes share the same intercepted args

g.title: telemetry
g.text: run.json, lane records, grading artifacts, fallback reasons

g.title: lanebundle
g.text: one or more extension files + prompt/data files
